account_id.text: ตั้งแต่บัญชี

root.sql:
select tab.* from ( SELECT sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id as "เลขที่บัญชี", CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_amount = 0 THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_amount END as "เดบิต", CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_amount = 0 THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_amount END as "เครดิต", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.desc_journal_detail as "รายละเอียด", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.doc_no as "เลขเอกสาร", CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_balance = 0 THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_balance END as "เดบิต คงเหลือ", CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_balance = 0 THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_balance END as "เครดิต คงเหลือ", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.sequence_gl_no as "ลำดับ", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date as "วันที่", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.branch_id as "สาขา", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.from_banch as "หน่วย" ,
sc_acc_m_account_master.nature , sc_acc_m_general_ledger.acc_book_type_id,
CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_account_master.nature = 'DR' THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_account_master.begin_balance_temp END as "เครดิต ยกมา" , CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_account_master.nature = 'CR' THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_account_master.begin_balance_temp END as "เดบิต ยกมา" ,
sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name as "ชื่อบัญชี" ,sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_year FROM sc_acc_m_general_ledger, sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_com_m_branch WHERE ( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_acc_m_general_ledger.branch_id ) and ( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.acc_book_type_id != 'CM' )
and sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date between '!journal_date_1!' and '!journal_date_2!'
union
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id "เลขที่บัญชี", null as "เดบิต", null as "เครดิต", null as "รายละเอียด", null as "เลขเอกสาร", null as "เดบิต คงเหลือ", null as "เครดิต คงเหลือ", null as "ลำดับ", null as "วันที่", null as "สาขา", null as "หน่วย" ,
sc_acc_m_account_master.nature , null acc_book_type_id,
CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_account_master.nature = 'DR' THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_account_master.begin_balance_temp END as "เครดิต ยกมา" , CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_account_master.nature = 'CR' THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_account_master.begin_balance_temp END as "เดบิต ยกมา" ,
sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name as "ชื่อบัญชี" ,sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year FROM sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE 1=1 and account_type_id = '3' and (not exists( select null from sc_acc_m_general_ledger where sc_acc_m_general_ledger.acc_book_type_id != 'CM' and sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id and sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date between '!journal_date_1!' and '!journal_date_2!'
) )
) tab ,sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_acc_m_account_year where 1=1 and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = tab."เลขที่บัญชี" and sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = tab.account_year /*WHERE*/ --and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id between '100000' and '220000' --and sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = 2019 order by tab."เลขที่บัญชี" , tab."วันที่" , tab."สาขา", tab."ลำดับ"
